help_articles.title: What is the minimum order amount?
help_articles.body:
## Minimum Order Amount

To keep delivery efficient and eco-friendly, we require a **minimum order amount of $30.00 (USD)** for all one-time orders, subscriptions, and rental orders.

### How it works
- The minimum is calculated **before tax** and **after discounts**.
- If your cart subtotal is **below $30**, you'll see a message asking you to add more items.
- Promotions and promo codes still apply, but the **discounted total must remain at or above $30**.

### Examples
- 3 cases of still water at $10 each → subtotal **$30** → ✅ meets the minimum.
- 2 cases of sparkling water at $11 each → subtotal **$22** → ❌ does not meet the minimum.

If you have any questions about order minimums, please contact our support team via the Help Center.

help_articles.title: How do subscriptions work?
help_articles.body:
## How Subscriptions Work

Our subscription service lets you schedule regular deliveries of your favorite water products.

### Key features
- Flexible frequencies: **every week**, **every 2 weeks**, or **every 4 weeks** (where available)
- Adjustable **quantity** and **delivery day**
- Skip, pause, or cancel anytime from **My Account → My Subscriptions**

### Managing your subscription
1. Go to **My Account → My Subscriptions**.
2. Click **Manage** on any active subscription.
3. Update the **frequency**, **quantity**, or **delivery day**.
4. Click **Save Changes** to apply your updates.

help_articles.title: How to reschedule a delivery
help_articles.body:
## How to Reschedule a Delivery

You can reschedule upcoming deliveries directly from your account.

1. Go to **My Account → Upcoming Deliveries**.
2. Find the delivery you want to change and click **Reschedule**.
3. Choose a new **delivery date** (within the allowed scheduling window).
4. Select a **time window** (e.g., *3:00 PM - 6:00 PM*).
5. Optionally select a different **delivery address** from your saved addresses.
6. Click **Confirm Delivery Schedule**.

You’ll receive an updated confirmation email once your delivery has been rescheduled.

help_articles.title: Using promo codes and discounts
help_articles.body:
## Using Promo Codes and Discounts

You can apply promo codes during checkout or from the cart page.

### How to apply a promo code
1. Add eligible items to your cart.
2. In the cart, find the **Promo Code** field.
3. Enter or paste your code and click **Apply**.
4. If valid, your discount and the updated total will be displayed.

### Important notes
- Some codes apply only to **one-time orders**, **subscriptions**, or **rentals**.
- Many promos **cannot be stacked** with other offers.
- Most promos require a **minimum order amount** (commonly $30.00).

Check the **Deals & Promo Codes** page for current offers and detailed terms.

help_articles.title: Managing your delivery addresses
help_articles.body:
## Managing Your Delivery Addresses

You can store multiple delivery addresses and switch between them at checkout or when rescheduling deliveries.

### Add a new address
1. Go to **My Account → Addresses**.
2. Click **Add New Address**.
3. Enter the label (e.g., *Home*, *Office*) and full address details.
4. Click **Save Address**.

### Set a default address
- On the Addresses page, click **Set as Default** next to your preferred address.
- New orders and subscriptions will use this address by default, but you can change it per order.
